title: Industrial Quality Support Services
entry_mechanism: Saudi quality services company certified by IATF and AIAG providing automotive cluster-wide quality support
executive_summary:
Automotive quality management — IATF 16949 certification support, APQP (Advanced Product Quality Planning) programme management, PPAP (Production Part Approval Process) documentation, FMEA facilitation, and supplier quality engineering — is a specialised professional service that Saudi Arabia's growing automotive cluster requires but cannot yet provide domestically. Every KAEC automotive manufacturer needs IATF 16949 certification; every Saudi automotive component supplier needs PPAP approval; every Saudi OEM programme needs APQP management. Today, all of this is provided by foreign consultancies at significant cost.

Node AU-14 targets a Saudi automotive quality services company: Saudi automotive quality engineers certified by IATF, VDA (German Automotive Association), and AIAG (American Automotive Industry Action Group) providing the full quality services stack for Saudi Arabia's automotive cluster. This is not a manufacturing node — it is the quality infrastructure layer that makes all other automotive manufacturing nodes function at OEM standards.

At $8–15 million in annual professional services revenue, AU-14 is the smallest node in the automotive programme but arguably the most enabling. No other AU node achieves OEM qualification without AU-14's services.

companies.name: TÜV SÜD Automotive
companies.rationale: TÜV SÜD provides IATF 16949 certification and automotive quality services globally. Saudi-certified TÜV SÜD affiliate for KAEC cluster.
companies.contact: TÜV SÜD VP Automotive Quality, Middle East

companies.name: Bureau Veritas Automotive
companies.rationale: BV provides automotive quality auditing and certification with active Gulf presence.
companies.contact: Bureau Veritas VP Automotive, Middle East

companies.name: AIAG (Automotive Industry Action Group)
companies.rationale: AIAG defines APQP, PPAP, and FMEA standards. AIAG training partnership for Saudi quality engineers.

companies.name: VDA QMC
companies.rationale: VDA QMC provides IATF 16949 and VDA 6.3 certification and training.

companies.name: Plexus Systems / Omnex
companies.rationale: Omnex provides automotive quality management software and consulting services.

partners.name: KAEC Automotive Cluster

partners.timeline: 18 months to first cluster quality contract
